data.name: dumbbell burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground.
Step:5 Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders.
Step:7 Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: bear crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired distance or time.

data.name: jack jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet together and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Jump up, spreading your feet apart and raising your arms above your head.
Step:3 As you land, quickly jump back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ski step
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: semi squat jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees while swinging your arms for momentum.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: stationary bike walk
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level.
Step:7 Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.

data.name: short stride run
instructions: Step:1 Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise.
Step:2 Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:3 Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms.
Step:4 After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace.
Step:5 Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.

data.name: burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Jump your feet back into the squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.

data.name: jump rope
instructions: Step:1 Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Step:5 Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: high knee against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground.
Step:4 Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible.
Step:6 Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: scissor jumps (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg.
Step:3 As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg.
Step:4 Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: astride jumps (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms.
Step:4 While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides.
Step:5 Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: back and forth step
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step.
Step:5 Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: alternating bear crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 (alternating variation) Continue for the desired distance or time.

data.name: stationary bike run
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired.
Step:5 Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture.
Step:6 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop.
Step:8 Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.

data.name: star jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively.
Step:3 As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: half knee bends (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: walking on stepmill
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support.
Step:3 Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs.
Step:4 Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles.
Step:5 Continue walking for the desired duration or distance.
Step:6 Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise.
Step:7 Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.

data.name: walking high knees lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg.
Step:3 Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:5 Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: wheel run
instructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms.
Step:3 Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:4 Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: jack burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up.
Step:5 Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.

data.name: run
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Step:3 Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Step:5 Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.

data.name: pulse style walk elliptical cross trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Emphasize pulse control.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

data.name: walk elliptical cross trainer - expanded variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Emphasize expanded control.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

data.name: push to run
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
